title: Record: Int6 3xMLP + Cosine Warmdown (val_bpb=1.1704)
body:
## Summary
- **val_bpb: 1.1704** (beats merged SOTA of 1.1748)
- Int6 STE quantization + 3x MLP width (24.1M params)
- Novel cosine warmdown schedule (smoother LR decay)
- Orthogonal init + RoPE base 50K
- Built on merged SOTA (10L + Muon WD + Overtone Init + Sliding Window + FP16 Embed)
- 8xH100 SXM, 7630 steps in 10 min, artifact 13.5MB

## Key Results
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| val_bpb (int8+zlib roundtrip) | **1.17043480** |
| val_loss | 1.97623014 |
| Total artifact size | 13,520,480 bytes |
| Steps completed | 7,630 |
| Training time | 603,111ms |

## Novel Contribution
**Cosine warmdown**: Replaces linear warmdown with `0.5 * (1 + cos(pi * progress))`, keeping LR higher for longer during early warmdown then decaying faster near the end. Standard in LLM pretraining (LLaMA, GPT-3) but not yet applied in this competition.

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify reproducibility on 8xH100 SXM
- [ ] Run additional seeds for statistical significance
- [ ] Confirm artifact size < 16MB
